violations.text: The kitchen does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2025

Soap and paper towel dispensers are located at the 3 bay sink. A sink used for FOOD preparation or UTENSIL washing, or a service sink or curbed cleaning facility used for the disposal of mop water or similar wastes, may not be provided with the handwashing aids and devices required for a HANDWASHING SINK. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine or quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2024
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 11/02/2024
